import Echo from 'laravel-echo'; import Pusher from 'pusher-js'; window.Pusher = Pusher; window.Echo = new Echo({ broadcaster: "pusher", key: import.meta.env.VITE_PUSHER_APP_KEY, cluster: import.meta.env.VITE_PUSHER_APP_CLUSTER, forceTLS: true, wsHost: import.meta.env.VITE_PUSHER_HOST, wsPort: import.meta.env.VITE_PUSHER_PORT, wssPort: import.meta.env.VITE_PUSHER_PORT, enabledTransports: ["ws", "wss"], });
